title: How they see me
withdrawnNote: Your response has been withdrawn. Nothing of yours remains in the aggregate.
alreadyNote: You already sent your response. You can withdraw it anytime with this link.
doneNote: Thank you. Your answers join a combined view only; they are never shown individually.
doneKeepLink: Keep this link if you ever want to withdraw your response.
intro: Someone you know is building a picture of how others experience them. Three quick questions, about one minute.
privacyPoints: Your answers are your own data: they are only ever shown combined with at least two other people, never one by one. You can withdraw anytime with this link.
scaleHint: 1 = not at all like them, 5 = very much like them

trait.extraversion: They gain energy around people and speak up easily.
trait.conscientiousness: They are organized and follow through on what they start.
trait.agreeableness: They are warm, considerate, and easy to get along with.

ackLlm: I agree that my answers may be processed by an AI system to build the combined picture.
ackOverseas: I agree that this processing may happen on servers outside my country.
guardianRow: My parent or guardian is with me and agrees to this.
submitError: Could not send. Try again in a moment.
withdrawAnytime: You can withdraw anytime by opening this link again.
subjectIntro: Send a one-time link to people who know you. Once three or more answer, the combined picture appears in your Seen lens; you never see individual answers.
labelField: Nickname for this person (only you see it)
createError: Could not create the link. Try again.
pendingCap: You have reached the limit of open invitations. Revoke one to send another.
privacyLine: The link works once, expires in 14 days, and stores no contact info.
emptyList: No invitations yet. Start with one person who knows you well.
shareMessage: Would you answer three quick questions about how you see me? About a minute:
aggregateNote: Answers appear only as a combined picture of three or more people, in the Seen lens.
withdrawError: Couldn't withdraw. Your response is still shared. Try again shortly.
revokeFailed: Couldn't revoke. The invitation link is still live. Try again.
